tools.name: search_kb
tools.description: Searches the support knowledge base and FAQs for solutions to customer problems.

tools.name: lookup_ticket_history
tools.description: Looks up the recent tickets for a specific customer email or ID.

tools.name: draft_reply
tools.description: Drafts a reply to the customer and places it in the Zendesk draft box for human review. Does NOT send it.

resources.name: Support Macros
resources.description: Canned responses and standardized macros for common issues.
